title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Malabar Gold & Diamonds

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Malabar Gold & Diamonds
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Malabar Gold & Diamonds! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds!
